trackC
trackCall.<locals>.trackr 
	trackCallB
@trackCall
def __hash__(self, *args):
    return hash(id(self))
@trackCall
def __str__(self, *args):
    return "AllTests"
@trackCall
def __repr__(self, *args):
    return "AllTests"
@trackCall
def __int__(self, *args):
    return 1
@trackCall
def __index__(self, *args):
    return 1
@trackCall
def __float__(self, *args):
    return 1.0
@trackCall
def __eq__(self, *args):
    return True
@trackCall
def __ne__(self, *args):
    return False
@trackCall
def __lt__(self, *args):
    return False
@trackCall
def __le__(self, *args):
    return True
@trackCall
def __gt__(self, *args):
    return False
@trackCall
def __ge__(self, *args):
    return True
z-@trackCall
def __%s__(self, *args):
    pass
